query_title: The Vampires or, The Arch Criminals of Paris

recommendations.title: Woman of the Hour
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actress crosses paths with a prolific serial killer in '70s LA when they're cast on an episode of "The Dating Game."

recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood 2: Love Song of Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Lady Snowblood is caught by the police and sentenced to death for her crimes. As she is sent to the gallows she is rescued by the secret police who offer her a deal to assassinate some revolutionaries.

recommendations.title: Chained
recommendations.overview: A serial killer kidnaps a young boy after murdering his mother, then raises him to be his accomplice. After years in captivity, the boy must choose between escaping or following in his captor's bloody footprints.

The most famous murder scene in movie history comprises 78 camera settings and 52 cuts: the shower scene in Alfred Hitchcock's Psycho. 78/52 tells the story of the man behind the curtain and his greatest obsession.

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: A Call to Arms
recommendations.overview: Allies of the Shadows seek revenge against humanity. This movie sets up the series, "Crusade," the sequel to "Babylon 5."

recommendations.title: Hikers
recommendations.overview: A quartet of Parisians embark upon a guided hike in Corsica and end up working through the sometimes comical chaos of their individual lives.

recommendations.title: Yaksha: Ruthless Operations
recommendations.overview: Nicknamed after a human-devouring spirit, the ruthless leader of an overseas black ops team takes up a dangerous mission in a city riddled with spies.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: I Am All Girls
recommendations.overview: A special crimes investigator forms an unlikely bond with a serial killer to bring down a global child sex trafficking syndicate.

recommendations.title: Jaws
recommendations.overview: When the seaside community of Amity finds itself under attack by a dangerous great white shark, the town's chief of police, a young marine biologist, and a grizzled shark hunter embark on a desperate quest to kill the beast before it strikes again.
